title: Aureline extension SDK conformance / compatibility result vocabulary (ADR seed)
description: Boundary schema for the conformance_result_record kind frozen in docs/extensions/sdk_publication_contract.md. Every run of a conformance / compatibility kit against a subject SDK release on a target host emits one record so the badge / support-window claims on schemas/extensions/sdk_release_bundle.schema.json rows are backed by a typed, replayable result rather than an inferred chip. Reuses the SDK-line, build-identity, WIT-world, host-ABI-window, compatibility-badge, and denial-reason vocabularies from sdk_release_bundle.schema.json without redefinition. Adding a new enumerated member or an additive field is additive-minor with a conformance_result_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw stack frames, raw test outputs, raw signing-key material, raw artifact bytes, and raw target-host secrets MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs only.

conformance_result_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this conformance-result vocabulary export.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the conformance-result payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log and export. Raw paths, raw secrets, raw URLs, raw stack frames, and raw test outputs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

sdk_line_id.description: Stable SDK-line identity. MUST equal the subject release row's sdk_line_id.

sdk_line_semver.description: Semver of the subject SDK line. MUST equal the subject release row's sdk_line_semver.

subject_release_artifact_class.description: Artifact-set class of the subject release. MUST equal the release row's release_artifact_class.

target_host_class.description: Where the result was produced. A production_host result MUST be reproducible against a reference_host_in_repo row before it can authorize a general_* support window; the SDK-publication seed enforces the cross-row check.

result_class.description: Frozen result-class vocabulary. pass_full_matrix MUST set coverage_class to full_declared_matrix. pass_subset_documented MUST set coverage_class to partial_subset_documented. fail_* and blocked_pre_run_environment MUST cite a non-null failure_reason_class. withdrawn_invalidated MUST cite failure_reason_class result_invalidated_by_publisher or conformance_kit_release_invalidated.

coverage_class.description: Coverage-class vocabulary describing how much of the kit's declared test matrix this result covered.

compatibility_badge_class.description: Frozen compatibility-badge vocabulary. The badge a result emits MUST be the narrowest badge that holds for the run; widening is denied with conformance_result_badge_widens_coverage.

failure_reason_class.description: Frozen failure-reason vocabulary. Required when result_class is fail_blocking, fail_non_blocking, blocked_pre_run_environment, or withdrawn_invalidated.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class for the row when emitted to an observable sink. Raw stack frames, raw test outputs, raw artifact bytes, and raw target-host secrets MUST NOT appear on any sink regardless of redaction class.

subject_release_ref.description: Ref to the sdk_release_bundle row under test.

subject_wit_world_refs.description: Worlds covered by this run. MUST be a subset of the subject release row's wit_world_refs; a result that targets a world outside the release set is denied with conformance_result_subject_world_outside_release_set.

target_host_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the target-host id. Raw URL / endpoint / credential bodies never carried.

conformance_kit_release_ref.description: Ref to the conformance_kit_release_row whose tooling produced this result.

executed_by_ref.description: Ref to the automation actor that executed the run. Raw user identity never carried.

failure_reason_class.description: Required (non-null) when result_class is fail_blocking, fail_non_blocking, blocked_pre_run_environment, or withdrawn_invalidated. Null otherwise.

evidence_artifact_refs.description: Refs to evidence captures (test logs, replayable run artifacts). Raw stack frames, raw test outputs, raw secrets MUST NOT appear; refs only.

static_docs_export_refs.description: Optional refs to docs_pack_export_row rows the result is republished into. A docs pack that pretends a release passed when no passing result exists is denied with docs_pack_export_drift_detected.

air_gapped_mirror_bundle_refs.description: Optional refs to offline_bundle_manifest_row rows the result is mirrored into. An air-gapped bundle that ships a release row without the matching conformance_result_record is denied with air_gapped_mirror_missing_conformance_evidence.

allOf.description: pass_full_matrix MUST set coverage_class = full_declared_matrix and MUST NOT cite a failure_reason_class.
pass_subset_documented MUST set coverage_class = partial_subset_documented and MUST NOT cite a failure_reason_class.
fail_blocking, fail_non_blocking, blocked_pre_run_environment, and withdrawn_invalidated MUST cite a non-null failure_reason_class.
withdrawn_invalidated MUST cite failure_reason_class = result_invalidated_by_publisher or conformance_kit_release_invalidated.

A pass result on a partial / probe coverage MUST emit a non-compatible_on_declared_targets badge; emitting compatible_on_declared_targets on partial coverage is denied with conformance_result_badge_widens_coverage.
